content.en: Look for the green icon with a phone. It might say FaceTime or WeChat. Tap it once to open.
content.zh: 寻找带有电话的绿色图标。它可能显示为FaceTime或微信。点击一次打开。

visual.description: Phone home screen with FaceTime/WeChat icon

en: What if I can't find the app?
Is FaceTime the same as WeChat?
Can you show me again?
zh: 如果我找不到应用怎么办？

content.en: Look at your list of contacts. Find the person you want to call. Tap their name once.
content.zh: 查看您的联系人列表。找到您想要呼叫的人。点击他们的名字一次。

visual.description: Contact list with one contact highlighted

en: How do I add a new contact?
What if I tap the wrong person?
Can I search for a name?
zh: 如果我点错了人怎么办？

content.en: Look for the video camera button. It's usually green or blue. Tap it once to start the call.
content.zh: 寻找视频摄像头按钮。它通常是绿色或蓝色的。点击一次开始通话。

visual.description: Contact details screen with video call button

en: What if they don't answer?
Can I turn off my camera?
How long can I talk?
zh: 如果他们不接听怎么办？

content.en: You'll see their face on the screen. Speak normally. They can see and hear you too!
content.zh: 您会在屏幕上看到他们的脸。正常说话。他们也能看到和听到您！

visual.description: Active video call screen showing remote person

en: Why can't I see them clearly?
How do I make it louder?
Can I switch cameras?

content.en: When you're done talking, look for the red button. Tap it once to hang up. That's it!
content.zh: 当您说完话后，寻找红色按钮。点击一次挂断。就这样！

visual.description: Video call screen with red end call button

en: What if I tap the wrong button?
Can I call them back?
Did I do something wrong?
zh: 如果我点错了按钮怎么办？

content.en: Open your Camera app. Point at what you want to photograph. Tap the big white circle button at the bottom.
content.zh: 打开相机应用。对准您想拍摄的东西。点击底部的大白色圆圈按钮。

visual.description: Camera app with capture button highlighted

en: Where is the Camera app?
How do I know if the photo was taken?
Can I see the photo I just took?
zh: 我怎么知道照片拍好了？
我可以看到刚拍的照片吗？

content.en: Open the Photos app. It looks like a colorful flower. Your newest photos are at the bottom.
content.zh: 打开照片应用。它看起来像一朵彩色的花。您最新的照片在底部。

visual.description: Photos app icon and photo library view

en: What if I can't find my photo?
How do I know which photo is newest?
Can I delete a photo?
zh: 如果我找不到照片怎么办？
我怎么知道哪张照片是最新的？

content.en: Tap the photo you want to send. Tap the share button (it looks like a box with an arrow). Choose Messages or WeChat.
content.zh: 点击您想发送的照片。点击分享按钮（看起来像一个带箭头的盒子）。选择信息或微信。

visual.description: Photo with share button highlighted

en: What does the share button look like?
Can I send to multiple people?
What if I pick the wrong person?
zh: 分享按钮是什么样子的？
我可以发送给多个人吗？
如果我选错了人怎么办？

content.en: Choose who to send to from your contacts. The photo will appear in the message. Tap Send. Done!
content.zh: 从联系人中选择要发送给谁。照片将出现在消息中。点击发送。完成！

visual.description: Message compose screen with photo attached

en: How do I know it was sent?
Can I add a message with the photo?
What if it doesn't send?
zh: 我怎么知道已经发送了？
我可以在照片上添加消息吗？
如果发送不出去怎么办？

content.en: Find the colorful map icon on your phone. It has red, yellow, blue, and green colors. Tap it once.
content.zh: 在手机上找到彩色地图图标。它有红色、黄色、蓝色和绿色。点击一次。

visual.description: Phone home screen with Google Maps icon

en: What if I don't have this app?
Is this the same as Apple Maps?
Do I need internet?
zh: 如果我没有这个应用怎么办？

content.en: At the top, you'll see a search box. Tap it once. Type the place you want to go, like 'library' or 'grocery store'.
content.zh: 在顶部，您会看到一个搜索框。点击一次。输入您想去的地方，比如图书馆或超市。

visual.description: Google Maps with search bar highlighted

en: What if I spell it wrong?
Can I search by address?
How do I use my voice?

content.en: After you find your place, tap the blue Directions button. Then tap the blue Start button at the bottom.
content.zh: 找到您的地点后，点击蓝色的路线按钮。然后点击底部的蓝色开始按钮。

visual.description: Google Maps showing directions and start button

en: Can I choose walking or driving?
What if I want to go later?
How do I see the whole route?
zh: 我可以选择步行或开车吗？
如果我想稍后去怎么办？

content.en: The map will show you where to go. Listen to the voice telling you when to turn. The blue dot is you!
content.zh: 地图会告诉您去哪里。听语音告诉您何时转弯。蓝点就是您！

visual.description: Active navigation screen with blue dot and route

en: What if I miss a turn?
Can I make it louder?
What if I get lost?
zh: 如果我错过了转弯怎么办？

content.en: Be careful of messages asking for money or personal information. Real companies never ask for passwords by text or email.
content.zh: 小心要求提供金钱或个人信息的消息。真正的公司永远不会通过短信或电子邮件索要密码。

visual.description: Example of scam message with warning signs

en: How do I know if a message is fake?
What should I do if I get a suspicious message?
Can scammers steal my information?
zh: 我怎么知道消息是假的？
如果我收到可疑消息该怎么办？
骗子能窃取我的信息吗？

content.en: Never share your passwords with anyone. Use different passwords for different apps. Write them down in a safe place at home.
content.zh: 永远不要与任何人分享您的密码。为不同的应用使用不同的密码。把它们写在家里的安全地方。

visual.description: Password field with security tips

en: What makes a good password?
What if I forget my password?
Is it safe to write passwords down?
zh: 如果我忘记密码怎么办？

content.en: Only click on links from people you know. Look for the lock icon in your browser. If something seems too good to be true, it probably is.
content.zh: 只点击您认识的人发来的链接。在浏览器中查找锁图标。如果某事看起来好得令人难以置信，那可能就是假的。

visual.description: Browser with security lock icon highlighted

en: What does the lock icon mean?
What if I accidentally click a bad link?
How do I know if a website is safe?
zh: 如果我不小心点击了坏链接怎么办？
我怎么知道网站是否安全？

content.en: Find the Google Maps app on your phone. It looks like a colorful map pin. Tap it once to open it.
content.zh: 在手机上找到谷歌地图应用。它看起来像一个彩色的地图图钉。点击一次打开它。

visual.description: Google Maps app icon on phone screen

en: What if I don't have Google Maps?
Do I need wifi to use it?
Is it free?
zh: 如果我没有谷歌地图怎么办？

content.en: Tap the search bar at the top. Type where you want to go. For example: Community Center or Grocery Store.
content.zh: 点击顶部的搜索栏。输入您想去的地方。例如：社区中心或杂货店。

visual.description: Google Maps search bar with destination typed

en: What if I don't know the exact address?
Can I search in Chinese?
What if nothing comes up?
zh: 如果我不知道确切地址怎么办？

content.en: After searching, tap the blue Directions button. Then tap the bus icon at the top to see bus routes.
content.zh: 搜索后，点击蓝色的路线按钮。然后点击顶部的公交图标查看公交路线。

visual.description: Google Maps directions screen with bus icon selected

en: Where is the bus icon?
What if there are no buses?
Can I see walking directions too?
zh: 如果没有公交车怎么办？
我也可以看步行路线吗？

content.en: Google Maps will show you step by step which bus to take, where to get on, and where to get off. Read each step carefully.
content.zh: 谷歌地图将逐步显示您乘坐哪路公交车，在哪里上车，在哪里下车。仔细阅读每个步骤。

visual.description: Step by step bus directions on Google Maps

en: What if I miss my stop?
How do I know when to get off?
Can I save these directions?
zh: 如果我错过了站怎么办？
我怎么知道什么时候下车？
我可以保存这些路线吗？

title.en: Find the Uber or Lyft App

content.en: Look for the Uber app (black icon) or Lyft app (pink icon) on your phone. If you do not have one, ask a family member to help you download it.
content.zh: 在手机上找到Uber应用（黑色图标）或Lyft应用（粉色图标）。如果没有，请家人帮您下载。

visual.description: Uber and Lyft app icons on phone screen

en: Which app is better, Uber or Lyft?
Is it safe to use these apps?
Do I need a credit card?

title.en: Enter Where You Want to Go

content.en: Tap the search bar that says Where to? Type your destination. For example: 123 Main Street or City Hospital.
content.zh: 点击显示'去哪里？'的搜索栏。输入您的目的地。例如：123主街或市立医院。

visual.description: Uber app with destination search bar

en: What if I don't know the address?
Can I use a landmark instead?
What if I type it wrong?
zh: 如果我不知道地址怎么办？

content.en: You will see different ride options and prices. UberX or Lyft Standard is the most affordable. Tap it to select.
content.zh: 您将看到不同的乘车选项和价格。UberX或Lyft标准版是最实惠的。点击选择。

visual.description: Uber ride options screen with prices

en: What is the difference between ride types?
Why are prices different?
Can I see the price before I confirm?
zh: 不同乘车类型有什么区别？
我可以在确认前看到价格吗？

content.en: After confirming, a driver will come to you. The app shows their name, car color, and how many minutes away they are. Wait at the pickup location.
content.zh: 确认后，司机将来接您。应用程序显示他们的姓名、车辆颜色以及还有几分钟到达。在接送地点等候。

visual.description: Uber waiting screen showing driver details and map

en: How do I know which car is mine?
What if the driver cancels?
Can I call the driver?
zh: 我怎么知道哪辆车是我的？
如果司机取消了怎么办？
我可以给司机打电话吗？

content.en: Open the Google Maps app on your phone. Make sure you are connected to wifi or data.
content.zh: 在手机上打开谷歌地图应用。确保您已连接到wifi或数据网络。

visual.description: Google Maps app open on phone

en: How do I know if I have wifi?
Can I use this without internet?
What if the app is slow?

content.en: Type the name or address of a place you visit often. For example: your doctor's office, the grocery store, or your child's home.
content.zh: 输入您经常去的地方的名称或地址。例如：您的医生诊所、杂货店或您孩子的家。

visual.description: Google Maps search results showing a location

en: What if I can't find the place?
Can I search by phone number?
What if there are many results?
zh: 如果我找不到地方怎么办？
我可以按电话号码搜索吗？
如果有很多结果怎么办？

content.en: Tap the place name to open it. Then tap the Save button (it looks like a bookmark). Choose Favorites to save it.
content.zh: 点击地点名称打开它。然后点击保存按钮（看起来像书签）。选择收藏夹进行保存。

visual.description: Google Maps place details with Save button highlighted

en: Where is the Save button?
Can I give it a nickname?
How many places can I save?
zh: 我可以给它起个昵称吗？
我可以保存多少个地方？

content.en: Next time, tap the Saved button at the bottom of Google Maps. Your favorite places will be listed there ready to navigate to.
content.zh: 下次，点击谷歌地图底部的已保存按钮。您收藏的地点将列在那里，随时可以导航。

visual.description: Google Maps Saved places list

en: Where is the Saved button?
Can I delete a saved place?
Can I share a saved place?
zh: 我可以删除已保存的地点吗？
我可以分享已保存的地点吗？

content.en: Open Google Maps. We will use it to find out exactly when the next bus is coming.
content.zh: 打开谷歌地图。我们将用它来查找下一班公交车的确切时间。

visual.description: Google Maps app open on phone

en: Is Google Maps free?
Do I need an account?
Can I use Apple Maps instead?
zh: 我可以用苹果地图代替吗？

content.en: Type the name of a nearby bus stop or just your current address in the search bar.
content.zh: 在搜索栏中输入附近公交站的名称或您当前的地址。

visual.description: Google Maps search bar with bus stop typed

en: How do I find my current address?
What if I don't know the bus stop name?
Can I use my current location?
zh: 如何找到我当前的地址？
如果我不知道公交站名称怎么办？
我可以使用我的当前位置吗？

content.en: Tap the blue Directions button. Then tap the bus icon. Google Maps will show you the next buses and their arrival times.
content.zh: 点击蓝色的路线按钮。然后点击公交图标。谷歌地图将显示下一班公交车及其到达时间。

visual.description: Google Maps with bus directions and arrival times

en: What does the bus icon look like?
What if there are no buses shown?
Can I see tomorrow's schedule?
zh: 公交图标是什么样子的？
如果没有显示公交车怎么办？
我可以看明天的时刻表吗？

content.en: You will see a list of departure times. The first one shown is the soonest bus. Screenshot this page so you can refer to it later without internet.
content.zh: 您将看到一个出发时间列表。显示的第一个是最近的公交车。截图此页面，以便以后没有网络时参考。

visual.description: Bus schedule list with departure times

en: How do I take a screenshot?
What if the bus is late?
How often do buses come?
zh: 如果公交车晚了怎么办？

content.en: When someone sends you a package, you get a tracking number by email or text. It is usually a long number. Save this number.
content.zh: 当有人给您寄包裹时，您会通过电子邮件或短信收到一个追踪号码。通常是一个长数字。保存这个号码。

visual.description: Email showing tracking number highlighted

en: Where do I find the tracking number?
What if I deleted the email?
What does a tracking number look like?
zh: 如果我删除了电子邮件怎么办？
追踪号码是什么样子的？

content.en: Open Safari or Chrome on your phone. Tap the address bar at the top and type: usps.com for US Mail or ups.com for UPS packages.
content.zh: 在手机上打开Safari或Chrome。点击顶部的地址栏，输入：usps.com（美国邮政）或ups.com（UPS包裹）。

visual.description: Browser address bar with usps.com typed

en: How do I know which carrier sent it?
What is Safari?
What if I use a different carrier?
zh: 我怎么知道是哪个快递公司寄的？
如果我用不同的快递公司怎么办？

content.en: Find the Track a Package box on the website. Carefully type your tracking number into the box. Then tap Track or Search.
content.zh: 在网站上找到追踪包裹框。仔细输入您的追踪号码。然后点击追踪或搜索。

visual.description: USPS website with tracking number input box

en: What if I type it wrong?
Can I copy and paste the number?
What if the website doesn't work?
zh: 我可以复制粘贴号码吗？
如果网站不工作怎么办？

content.en: The website will show where your package is right now. Look for: Out for Delivery (coming today!) or Delivered (check your door!).
content.zh: 网站将显示您的包裹现在在哪里。查找：正在派送（今天送到！）或已送达（检查您的门口！）。

visual.description: Package tracking status page showing delivery status

en: What if it says delayed?
What if I missed the delivery?
How long does shipping usually take?
zh: 如果我错过了送货怎么办？
运输通常需要多长时间？

content.en: Open the Google Maps app on your phone.
content.zh: 在手机上打开谷歌地图应用。

visual.description: Google Maps app open on phone

en: What if I don't have Google Maps?
Can I use a different map app?
Do I need internet?
zh: 如果我没有谷歌地图怎么办？
我可以使用其他地图应用吗？

content.en: Tap the search bar and type: Post Office near me. Google Maps will show all the post offices close to where you are right now.
content.zh: 点击搜索栏，输入：附近的邮局。谷歌地图将显示您附近所有的邮局。

visual.description: Google Maps showing post office search results

en: What if there are no results?
How far away are they?
Can I see them on the map?
zh: 我可以在地图上看到它们吗？

content.en: Tap on a post office to see its details. Look for the Hours section to make sure it is open before you go. Most close at 5pm on weekdays.
content.zh: 点击邮局查看其详细信息。查看营业时间部分，确保在您去之前它是开着的。大多数工作日5点关门。

visual.description: Post office details page showing hours

en: Are post offices open on weekends?
What if it says temporarily closed?
Can I call ahead?
zh: 如果显示临时关闭怎么办？

content.en: Tap the blue Directions button. Google Maps will show you how to walk or drive to the post office step by step.
content.zh: 点击蓝色的路线按钮。谷歌地图将逐步显示您步行或驾车前往邮局的路线。

visual.description: Google Maps directions to post office

en: Can I walk there?
Is there parking?
How long will it take?

content.en: Look at your paper bill or email bill. Find the company website address. It usually looks like: www.company.com. Write it down.
content.zh: 查看您的纸质账单或电子邮件账单。找到公司网站地址。它通常看起来像：www.company.com。写下来。

visual.description: Paper bill with website address highlighted

en: What if I can't find the website?
What if I only have a paper bill?
Can I pay by phone instead?
zh: 如果我找不到网站怎么办？
如果我只有纸质账单怎么办？

content.en: Open Safari or Chrome. Type the company website in the address bar. For example: www.pepco.com for electricity or www.washingtongas.com for gas.
content.zh: 打开Safari或Chrome。在地址栏中输入公司网站。例如：www.pepco.com（电费）或www.washingtongas.com（燃气费）。

visual.description: Browser showing utility company website

en: What is the address bar?
What if I type it wrong?
Is the website safe?

content.en: Look for a button that says Pay My Bill or Make a Payment. It is usually easy to find on the main page. Tap it.
content.zh: 查找显示缴费或付款的按钮。它通常在主页上很容易找到。点击它。

visual.description: Utility website with Pay My Bill button highlighted

en: What if I can't find the button?
Do I need to create an account?
Is it safe to pay online?
zh: 如果我找不到按钮怎么办？

content.en: You will need your account number from your bill and your payment method. Ask a family member to help you the first time so they can show you how.
content.zh: 您需要账单上的账号和付款方式。第一次请让家人帮助您，这样他们可以教您怎么做。

visual.description: Online payment form with account number field

en: Where is my account number?
Can I pay with a check?
Will I get a confirmation?

content.en: Before filling anything in, read the whole form first. Look at what information they are asking for so you can prepare your documents.
content.zh: 在填写任何内容之前，先阅读整个表格。查看他们要求提供什么信息，以便您准备好文件。

visual.description: Online form showing all fields before filling

en: What documents do I need?
What if I don't understand a question?
Can I save and come back later?
zh: 如果我不理解某个问题怎么办？
我可以保存后再回来吗？

content.en: Tap on the first empty box. Your keyboard will appear. Type your information carefully. Use the Next button on your keyboard to move to the next box.
content.zh: 点击第一个空框。键盘将出现。仔细输入您的信息。使用键盘上的下一步按钮移到下一个框。

visual.description: Online form with keyboard visible and first field selected

en: What if I make a mistake?
How do I delete what I typed?
What if the keyboard covers the form?
zh: 如果我犯了错误怎么办？
如何删除我输入的内容？
如果键盘遮住了表格怎么办？

content.en: Before submitting, read everything you typed. Check that your name, address, and phone number are spelled correctly. Mistakes can cause problems later.
content.zh: 提交前，阅读您输入的所有内容。检查您的姓名、地址和电话号码是否拼写正确。错误可能会在以后造成问题。

visual.description: Completed form being reviewed before submission

en: What if I find a mistake?
Can someone check it for me?
What happens if I submit wrong information?
zh: 如果我发现错误怎么办？
如果我提交了错误信息会怎样？

content.en: When you are ready, tap the Submit or Send button. You should see a confirmation message or get an email. Take a screenshot as proof.
content.zh: 准备好后，点击提交或发送按钮。您应该会看到确认消息或收到电子邮件。截图作为证明。

visual.description: Form submission confirmation screen

en: How do I take a screenshot?
What if I don't get a confirmation?
Can I submit the same form twice?
zh: 如果我没有收到确认怎么办？
我可以提交同一个表格两次吗？

content.en: Open Google Maps or the Yelp app on your phone. Both apps help you find restaurants near you. Yelp has more reviews from real customers.
content.zh: 在手机上打开谷歌地图或Yelp应用。两个应用都能帮您找到附近的餐厅。Yelp有更多真实顾客的评价。

visual.description: Google Maps and Yelp app icons on phone

en: What is Yelp?
Which app is better?
Is Yelp free?

content.en: Type what kind of food you want. For example: Chinese food near me or dim sum or Vietnamese restaurant. You can search in Chinese too!
content.zh: 输入您想要的食物类型。例如：附近的中餐厅、点心或越南餐厅。您也可以用中文搜索！

visual.description: Search results showing Chinese restaurants nearby

en: Can I filter by price?
Can I search by distance?
What if I want a specific dish?
zh: 如果我想要特定菜肴怎么办？

content.en: You will see a list of restaurants with star ratings and distance. Higher stars mean better reviews. Look for restaurants with 4 stars or more.
content.zh: 您将看到带有星级评分和距离的餐厅列表。星级越高意味着评价越好。寻找4星或以上的餐厅。

visual.description: Restaurant list with star ratings and distances

en: What do the stars mean?
How many reviews is enough?
What if all restaurants have low ratings?
zh: 如果所有餐厅评分都低怎么办？

content.en: Tap on a restaurant you like. Check that it is Open Now and read the address. You can tap Directions to get there using Google Maps.
content.zh: 点击您喜欢的餐厅。检查它是否正在营业，并阅读地址。您可以点击路线使用谷歌地图前往。

visual.description: Restaurant details page showing hours and address

en: What if it says closed?
How far is it?
Can I call the restaurant?
zh: 我可以给餐厅打电话吗？

content.en: After tapping on a restaurant in Yelp or Google Maps, scroll down. You will see a section called Reviews with star ratings and comments from other customers.
content.zh: 在Yelp或谷歌地图中点击餐厅后，向下滚动。您将看到一个名为评价的部分，其中有其他顾客的星级评分和评论。

visual.description: Restaurant page scrolled to reviews section

en: How do I scroll down?
How many reviews should I read?
Are all reviews real?
zh: 所有评价都是真实的吗？

content.en: Look at the most recent reviews first. They tell you how the restaurant is RIGHT NOW. Old reviews from 2 years ago may not be accurate anymore.
content.zh: 首先阅读最新的评价。它们告诉您餐厅现在的情况。两年前的旧评价可能不再准确。

visual.description: Reviews sorted by most recent with dates visible

en: How do I sort by newest?
What if there are no recent reviews?
How old is too old?
zh: 如果没有最新评价怎么办？

content.en: Good reviews mention: delicious food, friendly service, clean restaurant. Be careful if many reviews mention: slow service, wrong orders, or dirty tables.
content.zh: 好评提到：美味的食物、友好的服务、干净的餐厅。如果许多评价提到：服务慢、上错菜或桌子脏，请注意。

visual.description: Review with positive and negative keywords highlighted

en: What if reviews are mixed?
Should I trust 1-star reviews?
What if I can't read English reviews?
zh: 如果评价好坏参半怎么办？
如果我看不懂英文评价怎么办？

content.en: Scroll through the photos customers posted. Real photos show you what the food actually looks like. If the food photos look good, that is a great sign!
content.zh: 浏览顾客发布的照片。真实照片向您展示食物实际上是什么样子。如果食物照片看起来不错，那是一个好兆头！

visual.description: Customer food photos in restaurant gallery

en: How do I see more photos?
Are the photos real?
What if there are no photos?

content.en: On Google Maps or Yelp, tap the restaurant name. Look for a phone number with a phone icon next to it. Tap the number to call directly.
content.zh: 在谷歌地图或Yelp上，点击餐厅名称。查找旁边有电话图标的电话号码。点击号码直接拨打。

visual.description: Restaurant details page with phone number highlighted

en: What if there is no phone number?
What do I say when they answer?
What if no one answers?
zh: 如果没有电话号码怎么办？
如果没有人接听怎么办？

content.en: Some restaurants have a Reserve or Book a Table button on their page. Tap it to use OpenTable — an app that lets you book a table without calling.
content.zh: 一些餐厅在其页面上有预订或订桌按钮。点击它使用OpenTable——一个让您无需打电话就能订桌的应用。

visual.description: Restaurant page with Reserve button highlighted

en: What is OpenTable?
Is OpenTable free?
Do I need an account?

content.en: Select the date, time, and number of people in your party. For example: Saturday, 6:00 PM, 2 people. Then tap Find a Table or Search.
content.zh: 选择日期、时间和用餐人数。例如：周六晚上6点，2人。然后点击查找餐桌或搜索。

visual.description: OpenTable booking form with date, time, party size

en: What if my preferred time is not available?
Can I book for a large group?
Can I request a specific table?
zh: 如果我首选的时间不可用怎么办？
我可以为大型团体预订吗？
我可以要求特定的桌子吗？

content.en: You will get a confirmation by email or text message. Save this message! If you need to cancel, do it at least 2 hours before your reservation time to be polite.
content.zh: 您将通过电子邮件或短信收到确认。保存此消息！如果您需要取消，请至少提前2小时取消，这样比较礼貌。

visual.description: Reservation confirmation screen with details

en: What if I don't get a confirmation?
How do I cancel?
What if I am late?
zh: 如果我没有收到确认怎么办？

content.en: Find the DoorDash app (red icon) or Uber Eats app (black icon) on your phone. Ask a family member to help you set it up with your address and payment the first time.
content.zh: 在手机上找到DoorDash应用（红色图标）或Uber Eats应用（黑色图标）。第一次请让家人帮您设置地址和付款方式。

visual.description: DoorDash and Uber Eats app icons on phone

en: Which app is better?
Is delivery expensive?
Do I need a credit card?

content.en: You will see restaurants near you. You can browse by category: Chinese, American, Pizza, etc. Or search for a specific restaurant by name.
content.zh: 您将看到附近的餐厅。您可以按类别浏览：中餐、美式、披萨等。或按名称搜索特定餐厅。

visual.description: DoorDash home screen with restaurant categories

en: How do I find Chinese food?
Can I filter by price?
What if my favorite restaurant is not there?
zh: 如果我最喜欢的餐厅不在那里怎么办？

content.en: Tap on a restaurant to see their menu. Tap the + button next to any item you want. The item will be added to your cart at the bottom of the screen.
content.zh: 点击餐厅查看菜单。点击任何您想要的菜品旁边的+按钮。该菜品将被添加到屏幕底部的购物车中。

visual.description: Restaurant menu with + button and cart at bottom

en: How do I remove an item?
Can I add special instructions?
What if an item is sold out?
zh: 我可以添加特殊说明吗？

content.en: Tap the cart button to review your order. Check the items and total price including delivery fee. When ready tap Place Order. Your food will arrive in 30-45 minutes!
content.zh: 点击购物车按钮查看您的订单。检查菜品和包含配送费的总价。准备好后点击下单。您的食物将在30-45分钟内送达！

visual.description: Order review screen with Place Order button

en: How do I track my order?
What if the food is wrong?
Can I tip the driver?
